labels.name: kind/design
labels.description: Artifact kind: Product Design / PRD. Fallback for the Design Issue Type when native types are unavailable. Single-valued.

labels.name: kind/requirement
labels.description: Artifact kind: a single ISO-29148 'shall'-form requirement with Gherkin acceptance criteria. Fallback for the Requirement Issue Type. Single-valued.

labels.name: kind/competitor
labels.description: Artifact kind: one competitor profile (SWOT + feature-matrix row). Fallback for the Competitor Issue Type. Single-valued.

labels.name: kind/gap
labels.description: Artifact kind: one current-vs-desired delta (GAP grid). Fallback for the Gap Issue Type. Single-valued.

labels.name: kind/epic
labels.description: Artifact kind: large body of work spanning features. Fallback for the Epic Issue Type (GitHub ships no native Epic built-in). Single-valued.

labels.name: kind/feature
labels.description: Artifact kind: shippable capability. Fallback for the Feature Issue Type. Single-valued.

labels.name: kind/task
labels.description: Artifact kind: implementable unit of work. Fallback for the Task Issue Type. Single-valued.

labels.name: kind/spike
labels.description: Artifact kind: time-boxed research/investigation to retire risk. Fallback for the Spike Issue Type. Single-valued.

labels.name: status/triage
labels.description: Lifecycle: newly created, not yet processed. Mirrors the Project 'Status' field for repo-only viewers. Single-valued.

labels.name: status/in-design
labels.description: Lifecycle: design/requirement drafting in progress. Mirrors Project Status. Single-valued.

labels.name: status/in-review
labels.description: Lifecycle: awaiting agent or human review. Mirrors Project Status. Single-valued.

labels.name: status/blocked
labels.description: Lifecycle: blocked on a dependency or human decision. Mirrors Project Status. Single-valued.

labels.name: status/ready
labels.description: Lifecycle: accepted, ready to build. Mirrors Project Status. Single-valued.

labels.name: status/done
labels.description: Lifecycle: completed / merged. Mirrors Project Status. Single-valued.

labels.name: area/auth
labels.description: Domain area: authentication / identity. Product sub-system the issue touches. Multi-valued.

labels.name: area/billing
labels.description: Domain area: billing / payments / pricing. Multi-valued.

labels.name: area/ingestion
labels.description: Domain area: data ingestion / pipelines. Multi-valued.

labels.name: area/routing
labels.description: Domain area: routing / navigation / decision engine. Multi-valued.

labels.name: area/ux
labels.description: Domain area: UX / UI / front-end flows. Multi-valued.

labels.name: area/api
labels.description: Domain area: public/internal API surface. Multi-valued.

labels.name: area/infra
labels.description: Domain area: infrastructure / platform / CI. Multi-valued.

labels.name: area/market
labels.description: Domain area: market overview / competitive landscape (used on the Market Overview issue). Multi-valued.

labels.name: priority/p0
labels.description: Priority bucket: P0 — top priority, drop-everything. Coarse echo of RICE/WSJF rank and MoSCoW 'Must'. Single-valued.

labels.name: priority/p1
labels.description: Priority bucket: P1 — high priority. Echoes MoSCoW 'Should'. Single-valued.

labels.name: priority/p2
labels.description: Priority bucket: P2 — medium priority. Echoes MoSCoW 'Could'. Single-valued.

labels.name: priority/p3
labels.description: Priority bucket: P3 — low priority / backlog. Single-valued.

labels.name: agent/orchestrator
labels.description: Authoring/owning Boule subagent: the top-level Orchestrator. Audit + routing. Multi-valued.

labels.name: agent/architect
labels.description: Authoring/owning Boule subagent: Product Designer / architect. Multi-valued.

labels.name: agent/researcher
labels.description: Authoring/owning Boule subagent: Competitive Analyst / researcher. Multi-valued.

labels.name: agent/pm
labels.description: Authoring/owning Boule subagent: Requirements Engineer / PM. Multi-valued.

labels.name: agent/reviewer
labels.description: Authoring/owning Boule subagent: Critic / Reviewer. Multi-valued.

labels.name: boule:managed
labels.description: Operational: issue is managed by Boule. Lets humans filter all bot output (label:boule:managed). Applied to every Boule-created issue.

labels.name: boule:needs-human
labels.description: Operational: escalation flag — Boule could not satisfy a gate (e.g. failed 29148 repair loop) and requires human decision.

labels.name: boule:superseded
labels.description: Operational: artifact replaced by a newer one rather than deleted; set during supersession instead of closing without trace.

issueTypes.name: Design
issueTypes.description: A PRD / product-design doc: problem statement, personas, goals & explicit non-goals, JTBD job stories, UX flows, success metrics/KPIs, risks, open questions. Root of the artifact chain; parents Requirement and Epic. Custom org type.

issueTypes.name: Requirement
issueTypes.description: A single ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148 'shall'-form requirement with Gherkin (Given/When/Then) acceptance criteria and numeric, verifiable NFRs. Sub-issue of a Design; parents Task. Custom org type.

issueTypes.name: Epic
issueTypes.description: A large body of work spanning multiple features, derived from a Design or Gap. Parents Feature. Custom org type (GitHub ships no native Epic built-in); falls back to the kind/epic label on a Feature-typed issue when custom types are unavailable.

issueTypes.name: Feature
issueTypes.description: A shippable capability. Child of an Epic; parents Task. Maps to the GitHub built-in 'Feature' type.

issueTypes.name: Task
issueTypes.description: An implementable unit of work with a Connextra user story + Gherkin acceptance criteria, keyed back to a Requirement via 'Verifies'. Child of Feature/Requirement/Gap. Maps to the GitHub built-in 'Task' type.

issueTypes.name: Competitor
issueTypes.description: One competitor profile: SWOT plus a feature-matrix row and pricing, every claim carrying a sourced evidence URL + capture date. Sub-issue of a 'Market Overview' Design/Competitor issue. Custom org type.

issueTypes.name: Gap
issueTypes.description: One current-vs-desired delta expressed as a GAP grid row (Current | Desired | Gap | Action), with a McKinsey 7S / CMMI maturity lens. Child of a Design or Competitor; parents Task. Custom org type.

issueTypes.name: Spike
issueTypes.description: A time-boxed research/investigation issue to retire risk before committing to a Requirement or Feature. Child of an Epic/Feature. Custom org type.

discussionCategories.name: Agent Forum
discussionCategories.description: Agent-to-agent debate, hand-offs, and 'request review' threads. The accepted reply is marked as the answer to record the resolution. Maps to section 5.4 'Agent Forum' (isAnswerable=true).

discussionCategories.name: Design Review
discussionCategories.description: Structured critique of Design/Requirement issues before they reach 'Ready'. The reviewer agent posts findings, the author resolves, and the sign-off comment is marked as the answer. (isAnswerable=true).

discussionCategories.name: Daily Status
discussionCategories.description: The daily standup / 'dashboard' post — one Discussion per UTC day (keyed boule-status-YYYY-MM-DD), summarizing created/updated/closed artifacts, board snapshot, budget, and blockers. Announcement-style so it is non-answerable. (isAnswerable=false).
